user.title: YouTube Music Connector
user.description:
Use browser auth via a `browser.json` file in the format described by the official documentation. A step-by-step guide is available here: [Browser Auth Guide]({browser_auth_guide_url})

Recommended flow:
1. Create a `browser.json` file using the linked guide.
2. Store that file locally in Home Assistant.
3. Enter the full path below, for example `{example_header_path}`.
4. Click `Submit`. The flow runs a real song search to verify the connection.

Required keys in the file include `authorization`, `cookie`, `content-type`, `x-goog-authuser`, and `x-origin`.

Validated so far: `{validation_status}`

Last error: `{last_error}`

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure YouTube Music Connector
reconfigure.description:
Update browser auth, language, or the default target player. This step runs the same connection test as the initial setup.

Guide: [Browser Auth Guide]({browser_auth_guide_url})

Example path: `{example_header_path}`

Validated so far: `{validation_status}`

Last error: `{last_error}`

error.auth: Browser auth or the direct connection test to YouTube Music failed.
error.already_configured: This header file is already configured for another YouTube Music Connector instance.
error.missing_header: A valid header file path is required.
error.no_results: The connection test succeeded technically, but the song search returned no results.

abort.already_configured: This header file is already configured for another YouTube Music Connector instance.
abort.reconfigure_successful: The integration was updated and the connection test succeeded.
abort.reconfigure_failed: The integration entry to update could not be found.

error.auth: Browser auth or the direct connection test to YouTube Music failed.
error.already_configured: This header file is already configured for another YouTube Music Connector instance.
error.missing_header: A valid header file path is required.
error.no_results: The connection test succeeded technically, but the song search returned no results.

init.title: YouTube Music Connector Options
init.description:

Guide: [Browser Auth Guide]({browser_auth_guide_url})

Example path: `{example_header_path}`
